parameters.content:
## HINDSIGHT — cyber incident log pipeline

Drop a SIEM export, vuln scan, or phishing report (.pdf/.md/.txt) into **/data/incoming_docs**.

Gemini extracts → FastAPI re-scores severity & routes → Google Sheets + `output_docs/` (JSON + Markdown) + Gmail.

### Multimodal branch (BON-1)

If the doc embeds a dashboard/scan image, Gemini Vision reads the chart and the notes are folded into the main extraction.

`onError: continue` so a vision miss never blocks the pipeline.

### Severity is computed, not trusted

The FastAPI service re-scores severity from a rubric (service tier × jurisdiction breadth × impact language).

CVSS floors the result; SEV1 → immediate page.

### Retry / rate-limit handling (BON-4)

Gemini nodes: retryOnFail, 5 tries, 3s backoff — survives 429s. Enrichment: 3 tries.
